The eui-editor provides built-in ready to use validators to help user to validate their forms.

Usage import { euiEditorMinLength, euiEditorMaxLength, euiEditorMinWords, euiEditorMaxWords, euiEditorMinBytes, euiEditorMaxBytes } from '@eui/components/externals/eui-editor';
Validator Description
euiEditorMinLength(number) Validator that requires the length of the editor's content, out of HTML tags or JSON structure, to be greater than or equal to the provided minimum length.
euiEditorMaxLength(number) Validator that requires the length of the editor's content, out of HTML tags or JSON structure, to be less than or equal to the provided maximum length.
euiEditorMinWords(number) Validator that requires the number of words in the editor, out of HTML tags or JSON structure, to be greater than or equal to the provided minimum number.
euiEditorMaxWords(number) Validator that requires the number of words in the editor, out of HTML tags or JSON structure, to be less than or equal to the provided maximum number.

euiEditorMinLength (5) & euiEditorMaxLength (400) validators
HTML format (default)
@if (form1.get('htmlContent').hasError('required') && form1.get('htmlContent').touched) { This field is required } @if (form1.get('htmlContent').hasError('minLength') && form1.get('htmlContent').touched) { Minimum length for this field is {{ form1.get('htmlContent').errors.minLength.minLength }} and is currently {{ form1.get('htmlContent').errors.minLength.actual }} } @if (form1.get('htmlContent').hasError('maxLength') && form1.get('htmlContent').touched) { Maximum length for this field is {{ form1.get('htmlContent').errors.maxLength.maxLength }} and is currently {{ form1.get('htmlContent').errors.maxLength.actual }} }
Editor's contents
{{ form1.get('htmlContent').value }}
JSON format
@if (form2.get('jsonContent').hasError('required') && form2.get('jsonContent').touched) { This field is required } @if (form2.get('jsonContent').hasError('minLength') && form2.get('jsonContent').touched) { Minimum length for this field is {{ form2.get('jsonContent').errors.minLength.minLength }} and is currently {{ form2.get('jsonContent').errors.minLength.actual }} } @if (form2.get('jsonContent').hasError('maxLength') && form2.get('jsonContent').touched) { Maximum length for this field is {{ form2.get('jsonContent').errors.maxLength.maxLength }} and is currently {{ form2.get('jsonContent').errors.maxLength.actual }} }
Editor's contents
{{ form2.get('jsonContent').value }}
euiEditorMinWords (5) & euiEditorMaxWords (10) validators
HTML format (default)
@if (form3.get('htmlContent').hasError('required') && form3.get('htmlContent').touched) { This field is required } @if (form3.get('htmlContent').hasError('minWords') && form3.get('htmlContent').touched) { Minimum number of words for this field is {{ form3.get('htmlContent').errors.minWords.minWords }} and is currently {{ form3.get('htmlContent').errors.minWords.actual }} } @if (form3.get('htmlContent').hasError('maxWords') && form3.get('htmlContent').touched) { Maximum number of words for this field is {{ form3.get('htmlContent').errors.maxWords.maxWords }} and is currently {{ form3.get('htmlContent').errors.maxWords.actual }} }
Editor's contents
{{ form3.get('htmlContent').value }}
JSON format
@if (form4.get('jsonContent').hasError('required') && form4.get('jsonContent').touched) { This field is required } @if (form4.get('jsonContent').hasError('minWords') && form4.get('jsonContent').touched) { Minimum number of words for this field is {{ form4.get('jsonContent').errors.minWords.minWords }} and is currently {{ form4.get('jsonContent').errors.minWords.actual }} } @if (form4.get('jsonContent').hasError('maxWords') && form4.get('jsonContent').touched) { Maximum number of words for this field is {{ form4.get('jsonContent').errors.maxWords.maxWords }} and is currently {{ form4.get('jsonContent').errors.maxWords.actual }} }
Editor's contents
{{ form4.get('jsonContent').value }}
